actual_current_surface_status: exact support / clean source-Higgs outside-math route selector; positive closure still open
conditional_surface_status: conditional-support if a future same-surface O_H certificate, source-Higgs pole rows, and scalar-LSZ authority land and the aggregate gates pass
exact_next_action: For the clean source-Higgs route, attempt a same-surface invariant-ring/commutant/primitive-cone derivation of the canonical O_H identity and normalization certificate.  If and only if that certificate lands, produce C_ss/C_sH/C_HH pole rows and run the GNS/Gram-purity plus scalar-LSZ aggregate gates.

outside_math_route_rows.clean_use: derive a same-surface canonical O_H operator identity and normalization certificate, or prove a one-dimensional neutral top-coupled scalar sector
outside_math_route_rows.current_blocker: exact negative boundary / same-surface O_H identity and normalization certificate not derivable from current PR230 primitives
outside_math_route_rows.not_allowed_use: do not cite symmetry labels or Schur's lemma unless the same-surface representation/action data are supplied
outside_math_route_rows.tool_family: representation theory, invariant rings, Schur/commutant analysis

outside_math_route_rows.clean_use: certify pole purity from a rank-one moment/Gram matrix built from same-surface C_ss, C_sH, and C_HH rows
outside_math_route_rows.current_blocker: open / source-Higgs Gram purity gate not passed
outside_math_route_rows.not_allowed_use: do not flat-extend source-only C_ss data or rows against an unratified operator
outside_math_route_rows.tool_family: operator algebras, truncated moment problems, semidefinite flat extension

outside_math_route_rows.clean_use: compute exact finite-volume C_ss/C_sH/C_HH or Schur A/B/C rows after the same-surface operator/action is defined
outside_math_route_rows.current_blocker: open / source-Higgs production launch blocked by missing O_H certificate
outside_math_route_rows.not_allowed_use: do not let exact arithmetic define O_H or kappa_s by convention
outside_math_route_rows.tool_family: exact tensor networks, PEPS transfer contraction, finite-volume character tensors

outside_math_route_rows.clean_use: derive exact analytic-continuation or moment/threshold/FV authority for scalar-LSZ rows after same-surface correlators are present
outside_math_route_rows.current_blocker: exact-support / FH-LSZ Stieltjes moment-certificate gate; strict positive certificate absent
outside_math_route_rows.not_allowed_use: do not infer source-to-Higgs overlap from a closed-form C_ss function alone
outside_math_route_rows.tool_family: creative telescoping, Picard-Fuchs equations, WZ recurrences, isomonodromic systems

outside_math_route_rows.clean_use: produce exact row values or a neutral irreducibility theorem when applied to the PR230 same-surface transfer/action block
outside_math_route_rows.current_blocker: exact negative boundary / neutral-scalar primitive-cone stretch no-go on current PR230 surface
outside_math_route_rows.not_allowed_use: do not import large-N or free-limit factorization as Nc=3 proof without a bound
outside_math_route_rows.tool_family: Speicher cumulants, finite-N Weingarten calculus, exact matrix-integral expansions

outside_math_route_rows.clean_use: recognize exact constants after a same-surface row or theorem has already produced the quantity being recognized
outside_math_route_rows.current_blocker: value recognition is not an operator identity or source-overlap theorem
outside_math_route_rows.not_allowed_use: do not use PSLQ hits or observed targets as proof selectors for O_H, y_t, g2, kappa_s, c2, or Z_match
required_output_contract: a prior same-surface row/certificate plus an independent precision/audit certificate
outside_math_route_rows.tool_family: PSLQ, integer relations, periods, motivic Galois/MZV recognition

parent_statuses.canonical_higgs_operator_realization_gat: open / canonical-Higgs operator realization gate not passed
parent_statuses.canonical_oh_premise_stretch: exact negative boundary / same-surface O_H identity and normalization certificate not derivable from current PR230 primitives
parent_statuses.fms_oh_certificate_construction_attempt: exact negative boundary / FMS O_H certificate construction blocked on current PR230 surface
parent_statuses.full_positive_closure_assembly_gate: open / full positive PR230 closure assembly gate not passed
parent_statuses.neutral_scalar_commutant_rank_no_go: exact negative boundary / neutral scalar commutant does not force rank-one purity
parent_statuses.neutral_scalar_primitive_cone_stretch_no: exact negative boundary / neutral-scalar primitive-cone stretch no-go on current PR230 surface
parent_statuses.nonchunk_current_surface_exhaustion: exact negative boundary / current PR230 non-chunk route queue exhausted; positive closure still open
parent_statuses.nonchunk_future_artifact_intake: exact negative boundary / PR230 non-chunk future-artifact intake finds no executable current route; positive closure still open
parent_statuses.retained_closure_route: open / retained closure not yet reached
parent_statuses.scalar_lsz_stieltjes_moment_gate: exact-support / FH-LSZ Stieltjes moment-certificate gate; strict positive certificate absent
parent_statuses.schur_compressed_denominator_row_bootstr: exact negative boundary / Schur compressed-denominator row-bootstrap no-go
parent_statuses.source_higgs_gram_purity_gate: open / source-Higgs Gram purity gate not passed
parent_statuses.source_higgs_production_readiness_gate: open / source-Higgs production launch blocked by missing O_H certificate
parent_statuses.source_higgs_unratified_gram_shortcut_no: exact negative boundary / unratified source-Higgs Gram shortcut is not O_H authority
parent_statuses.wz_smoke_to_production_promotion_no_go: exact negative boundary / WZ smoke rows cannot be promoted to production WZ response

proposal_allowed_reason: Outside-math tools are classified only as methods for producing future same-surface certificates.  Current O_H/C_sH/C_HH rows, neutral irreducibility, Schur rows, strict scalar-LSZ authority, and W/Z response rows remain absent.

stage_1.goal: same-surface canonical O_H identity and normalization

selected_clean_route.why_cleanest: It attacks the exact missing map from the PR230 scalar source to canonical Higgs directly, instead of normalizing through W/Z or downstream matching observables.

strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained PR230 closure
does not reopen the non-chunk route queue on prose or path names
does not treat PSLQ, motivic recognition, or exact constants as proof selectors
does not import H_unit, yt_ward_identity, observed targets, alpha_LM, plaquette, u0, c2=1, Z_match=1, or kappa_s=1
does not use reduced pilots, smoke rows, or exact toy contractions as production evidence
